count_policy: Only active_current projects count as current projects. Predecessors, deleted candidates, placeholders, shared old data, and generated run artifacts do not count.

notes: V1 building-code auditor appears to be a predecessor or maintainer copy, not a separate current project unless the user confirms otherwise.
There are untracked V2 audit-run files that appear related and should be reviewed before staging.

The exact public name may need user confirmation; this inventory uses the user's phrase as the slug.
